title: Review: Zephyr C code 2026-06-28
description: Single-pass read-only code review of the Zephyr C code scope. Findings are filed as child issues under this epic.
notes: Review confidence: 35% chance of missed bug. Least confident areas: generated/board-specific Zephyr driver integration, full SCHC rule coverage, and code paths behind Kconfig combinations not visible from static reading. Would raise confidence if: a Zephyr build matrix for the lichen module ran cleanly, unit tests covered OSCORE/link/RPL null and boundary cases, and compile_commands.json for the current tree was available.
